options.name: -early
options.description: Generates the timing report for early paths

options.name: -expanded_summary_clocks
options.description: Generates report in terms of each possible clock domain pair separately.

options.name: -late
options.description: Generates the timing report for late paths

options.name: -merged_groups
options.description: Merges all the clock groups for a consolidated timing summary.

options.name: -merged_views
options.description: Generates merged report across all views.

options.name: -retime
options.description: {path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation} Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified method

options.name: -retime_mode
options.description: Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified retime mode

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a timing report for the specified analysis view only. By default all active views are analyzed (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
